headline.zh: 中國開源模型 Kimi K3 與 Qwen 3.8 崛起，挑戰美國封閉專利生態
headline.en: China's Kimi K3 and Qwen 3.8 challenge US AI dominance with aggressive open-weight strategy

detail.zh: 中國頂尖 AI 廠商（月之暗面、阿里）接連推出 Kimi K3 與 Qwen 3.8，宣稱能以極低成本抗衡 OpenAI 與 Anthropic。這使得美國以封閉、專利為主的 AI 領先優勢面臨嚴峻挑戰。
detail.en: China's leading AI labs are releasing models like Kimi K3 and Qwen 3.8 that rival top US proprietary models at a fraction of the cost, threatening the US's closed-source dominance.

headline.zh: OpenAI 揭露長週期（Long-Horizon）模型安全與對齊挑戰
headline.en: OpenAI shares safety and alignment lessons for long-horizon AI models

detail.zh: 隨著 AI 執行任務的時間拉長，OpenAI 釋出其部署長週期模型的安全經驗，指出新型態的安全風險、觀察到的失效模式，以及如何透過迭代部署建立改進的防護機制。
detail.en: As AI agents run for longer periods, OpenAI highlights new safety risks, failure modes, and mitigation strategies learned from deploying long-horizon models.

headline.zh: NVIDIA 推出 Cosmos 3 Edge，加速邊緣端 AI 部署
headline.en: NVIDIA introduces Cosmos 3 Edge for accelerated edge AI deployment

detail.zh: NVIDIA 於 Hugging Face 推出 Cosmos 3 Edge，旨在提升邊緣運算裝置上的 AI 推理效率，為開發者提供更強大的本機端部署工具。
detail.en: NVIDIA has launched Cosmos 3 Edge on Hugging Face, designed to optimize and accelerate AI inference directly on edge devices, empowering local-first developers.

headline.zh: 超越傳統 Grep：Augment Code 倡導建立富上下文的 AI 程式碼安全框架
headline.en: Beyond grep: Augment Code advocates for context-rich AI coding harnesses

detail.zh: 專訪 Augment Code 的 Vinay Perneti，探討如何透過建立富含上下文（context-rich）的開發框架，解決現有 AI 程式碼生成工具缺乏專案全域認知、難以處理複雜依賴關係的痛點。
detail.en: An interview with Augment Code's Vinay Perneti highlights the necessity of context-rich harnesses over simple search tools to help AI coding assistants understand complex codebase dependencies.

headline.zh: AI 關鍵通訊協定引入「無狀態」Session ID，大幅簡化伺服器端開發
headline.en: AI's key protocol adopts stateless session IDs to simplify server-side development

detail.zh: 該協定更新後將採用類似傳統網頁的「無狀態（stateless）」伺服器端 Session ID 處理機制。這將降低開發者維護長連接狀態的複雜度，使 AI 應用的擴展更為容易。
detail.en: The updated protocol adopts a stateless approach to session IDs on the server side, mirroring standard web architecture and significantly reducing the complexity of scaling AI backends.

headline.zh: AI 讓硬體逆向工程與自動化成本降至冰點
headline.en: AI agents drastically lower the cost of hardware reverse-engineering

detail.zh: Simon Willison 指出，開發者正廣泛利用 AI 程式碼 Agent 快速逆向工程並自動化家用智慧裝置。過去因投資報酬率過低而被放棄的非官方 API 串接，如今在 AI 輔助下變得極其廉價且可行。
detail.en: Simon Willison highlights how developers are using coding agents to reverse-engineer and automate home devices, turning previously high-effort, low-ROI tasks into cheap, viable weekend projects.

headline.zh: Adobe 實驗性相機 App「Project Indigo」引入生成式 AI 工具
headline.en: Adobe's experimental camera app 'Project Indigo' embraces generative AI

detail.zh: 原本主打「自然單眼感」的 iPhone 相機 App Project Indigo，在最新更新中加入了生成式 AI 工具（如背景消除與照片評估），且出乎意料地並非完全依賴 Adobe 自家的 Firefly 模型。
detail.en: Originally designed for a natural SLR-like look, Adobe's Project Indigo iPhone app has been updated with generative AI tools for background removal and critiques, notably stepping beyond Firefly models.

headline.zh: Claude Fable 成功構造出數學界「雅可比猜想」的反例
headline.en: Claude Fable produces a counterexample to the Jacobian Conjecture

detail.zh: 數學家分享 Claude Fable 模型成功構造出一個針對著名數學難題「雅可比猜想（Jacobian Conjecture）」的反例，展示了前沿 LLM 在高等數學推導與符號計算中的驚人潛力。
detail.en: A mathematician revealed that Claude Fable successfully generated a counterexample to the famous Jacobian Conjecture, showcasing LLMs' growing capability in advanced mathematical reasoning.

headline.zh: 研究指出：AI 建議會降低人類判斷準確度，卻盲目提升自信心
headline.en: Study: AI advice suppresses critical thinking, making users less accurate but more confident

detail.zh: 最新研究顯示，接受 AI 給予的建議會抑制人類的批判性思考。受試者在獲得 AI 協助後，給出錯誤答案的機率增加，但對自身答案的信心卻反而上升，凸顯了過度依賴 AI 的認知偏誤風險。
detail.en: A new study reveals that AI recommendations suppress critical thinking, leading users to accept wrong answers more frequently while paradoxically increasing their confidence in those incorrect decisions.

headline.zh: Cursor 探討 Agent 群體（Swarms）與全新模型經濟學
headline.en: Cursor explores agent swarms and the shift in model economics

detail.zh: Cursor 團隊分析了多 Agent 協同（Agent Swarms）對模型推理成本與架構設計的影響。隨著單次任務呼叫次數暴增，如何優化小模型與大模型的混合調度，成為降低開發成本的關鍵。
detail.en: Cursor discusses how agent swarms are reshaping model economics, emphasizing the need to balance small and large models to manage the compounding costs of multi-agent workflows.

headline.zh: 科技分析師建議美國立法保障「模型蒸餾」以對抗中國開源優勢
headline.en: Analyst proposes US legalize model distillation to counter Chinese open-weight threat

detail.zh: 針對中國開源模型的威脅，Ben Thompson 建議美國應立法明確將「訓練數據收集」視為合理使用，並禁止限制「模型蒸餾（distillation）」的服務條款，以協助美國開源社群更有效地與中國競爭。
detail.en: Ben Thompson proposes that the US should pass laws declaring training data collection as fair use and banning anti-distillation terms of service, helping US open-source models compete with China.

headline.zh: 奧特曼內部言論曝光：擬釋出本地 GPT-3 等級模型以打壓競爭對手融資
headline.en: Leaked Sam Altman quote reveals plan to release local GPT-3 class model to block rivals

detail.zh: 洩露的董事會討論顯示，Sam Altman 曾計畫儘快推出可在消費級硬體本機運行的 GPT-3 等級模型。其戰略意圖在於搶在 Stability 等對手前佔領市場，從而遏制其他開源項目的融資能力。
detail.en: A leaked quote from Sam Altman reveals OpenAI's internal strategy to release a local, consumer-hardware-friendly GPT-3 class model specifically to preempt rivals like Stability and discourage their funding.

headline.zh: 川普政府新任 AI 專員 David Sacks 離職後，繼任者亦已閃電辭職
headline.en: Trump’s latest AI czar resigns shortly after David Sacks' departure

headline.zh: Google 研發新型 AI 晶片，旨在大幅提升 Gemini 模型運行效率
headline.en: Google reportedly developing a new AI chip to boost Gemini's efficiency

headline.zh: YouTube 更新營利政策，明確限制低品質 AI 垃圾影片（AI Slop）獲利
headline.en: YouTube updates monetization policies to crack down on low-quality AI slop

headline.zh: 黃仁勳結束日本行，與日本科技生態系達成多項 AI 合作協議
headline.en: Jensen Huang secures extensive AI deals across Japan's tech ecosystem
